archive_policy.reason: Official third-party observations are excluded from redistribution. Their URLs, retrieval date, checksums, transformations, and locked derived anchor values are retained.

classification_policy.direct_data_anchor: A value calculated from a preserved official data snapshot.
classification_policy.normalized_parameter: A transparent model choice subjected to sensitivity analysis and not described as empirical calibration.
classification_policy.official_scenario_anchor: A published official stress range used to bound a scenario, not an estimate of the simulated population.

sources.limitations: Macro, multi-strategy, relative-value, and managed-futures gross leverage is excluded because derivative gross exposures are not comparable to the model's single long risky asset.
sources.title: Hedge Fund Monitor: leverage by strategy
sources.use: Direct data anchor for initial gross-assets-to-net-assets leverage.

sources.limitations: Size-cohort aggregates bound a stylized cross-sectional range; they do not identify an individual-fund distribution.
sources.title: Hedge Fund Monitor: unencumbered cash ratio by size cohort
sources.use: Direct data anchor for unencumbered cash as a share of gross assets.

sources.limitations: Maturity shares are not withdrawal probabilities and are not used as such.
sources.title: Hedge Fund Monitor: financing liquidity by maturity
sources.use: Direct data anchor for the presence of short-maturity financing exposure.

sources.limitations: The broad equity index is a plausibility anchor for a normalized risky asset, not a fitted return process.
sources.publisher: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis
sources.title: S&P 500 daily series
sources.use: Direct data anchor for the range of 21-trading-day market losses.

sources.limitations: The scenarios concern fund outflows and only bound, rather than estimate, short-term funding withdrawal in the model.
sources.title: Liquidity Stress Tests for Investment Funds: A Practical Guide
sources.use: Official scenario cross-check for severe but plausible 5, 10, and 20 percent outflow magnitudes.

sources.limitations: The range is mapped to a declared 10 percent reference sale fraction; it is not estimated from the simulated market.
sources.title: Macroprudential Stress-Test Models: A Survey
sources.use: Official scenario anchor for 150 to 300 basis-point price impacts in less-liquid asset classes.
